title: DCSync Attack: Directory Replication Request from Non-DC
description: Detects Event 4662 directory access with replication GUIDs (1131f6aa/1131f6ad) requested by non-machine accounts — classic DCSync attack using mimikatz lsadump::dcsync to extract domain password hashes remotely.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4662' and ('Original Log Content' like '%1131f6aa%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%1131f6ad%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%89e95b76%') and not 'Original Log Content' like '%SubjectUserName:%$%' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Domain = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectDomainName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Requests by Account, Domain, Entity | sort -Requests
